title: Per-regime CatBoost blend weights without calibration
summary: Use different fixed CatBoost weights for simple race regimes, without beta/isotonic calibration.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Define simple regimes using existing non-target covariates such as slick/wet and early/mid/late race progress. Learn or grid-select CatBoost blend weights per regime on OOF, then apply to test rows. Do not add probability calibration.
expected_effect: Capture cases where CatBoost helps more in specific race conditions while avoiding a full calibration system.
risk: Regime-specific weights can overfit small segments and complicate interpretation.
